name: extract_obligations
description: Extract legal obligations from a regulation text chunk. Each obligation must be a concrete, testable duty/prohibition/permission for a subject. Use DDL operators [O], [F], [P]. If you cannot ground the obligation in the chunk text, do not emit it. Call this tool exactly once with the structured list of obligations you extracted.

source_text_snippet.description: Quote from input that grounds this obligation

article.description: Article number from the regulation text, e.g. 'Article 4' or '4(2)'. Empty string if not identifiable.

section.description: Section heading or chapter name if visible, else empty string.

paragraph.description: Paragraph number within the article if identifiable, else 0.
